prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile game system art, square illustration
Primary request: Relic Vault art for Vavarda, a sanctuary where shards become permanent power
Scene/background: underground arcane sanctum with carved vault walls, glowing circles, suspended relic shards and ancient mechanisms
Subject: central vault altar or reliquary pedestal with floating crystal shards orbiting above it, powerful but elegant
Style/medium: premium dark-fantasy feature illustration, rich detail, clean silhouette, made for in-game system card
Composition/framing: centered altar, square composition, symmetric and ceremonial, clear focal point
Lighting/mood: mystical, sacred, slow-burning power, cool cyan-violet light with subtle depth
Color palette: midnight blue, black stone, silver, cyan-violet glow, restrained gold details
Materials/textures: stone vault, relic crystal, polished metal, magical dust
Quality: high
Constraints: no text, no logo, no watermark, no frame, no hero character, avoid clutter, must read as a magical progression chamber
